title: The Most Important IIM Ahmedabad Course
description:
A course from Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad explores success from an unexpected angle, not how to achieve it, but how to avoid regret after achieving it. “The Remains of the MBA” is built around The Remains of the Day by Kazuo Ishiguro, and asks a question most careers never do: what did success quietly cost you?


Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
